zh.lifeSummary: 當Jonet Llwyd ferch Jenkins Llwyd Hen於1422年出生在英國威爾斯時，她的父親Jenkyn Lloyd Ap Rhys42歲，母親Angharad Gruffudd42歲。她和Lord Phillip Phillips ap Maredudd至少有1個兒子。她去世於1530年在威爾士卡馬特史爾享年108歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jonet Llwyd ferch Jenkins Llwyd Hen于1422年出生在英国威尔斯时，她的父亲Jenkyn Lloyd Ap Rhys42岁，母亲Angharad Gruffudd42岁。她和Lord Phillip Phillips ap Maredudd至少有1个儿子。她去世于1530年在威尔士卡馬特史爾享年108岁。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Jenkins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Jenkin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Jenkins is one of the most common surnames in England, especially southwestern England, but is also especially associated with Wales.

variants.name: Jenkin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal names Jankin, Jenkin, and Jonkin, pet forms of Jan, Jen, and Jon + the hypocoristic suffix -kin. In Middle English, names in -kin were often used to name the younger of two family members with the same personal name.

variants.name: Jinkins
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of   Jenkins  .

nameMeanings.name: Hen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a short form of the personal name   Heinrich  .

Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 田 based on its pronunciation of the Siyi Cantonese subdialect (also known as Sze Yup or Four Districts dialect including Taishanese) spoken in southern Guangdong, see   Tian   1.

variants.name: Heinrich
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Helmut, Manfred, Otto, Dieter, Hans, Christl, Ewald, Gerd, Gerhard, Guenter.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the personal name Heinrich, composed of the ancient Germanic elements haim, heim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power’ (see also Henry ). In the Middle Ages this was the most popular of personal names in Germany.

en.lifeSummary: When Jonet Llwyd ferch Jenkins Llwyd Hen was born in 1422, in Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Jenkyn Lloyd Ap Rhys, was 42 and her mother, Angharad Gruffudd, was 42. She had at least 1 son with Lord Phillip Phillips ap Maredudd. She died in 1530, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, at the age of 108.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jonet Llwyd ferch Jenkins Llwyd Hen est née en 1422, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Jenkyn Lloyd Ap Rhys, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Angharad Gruffudd, avait 42 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Lord Phillip Phillips ap Maredudd. Elle est décédée en 1530, à Carmarthenshire, Galles, à l’âge de 108 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Jonet Llwyd ferch Jenkins Llwyd Henが1422年にイギリスウェールズで生まれた時，父Jenkyn Lloyd Ap Rhysは42歳，母Angharad Gruffuddは42歳であった。彼女はLord Phillip Phillips ap Mareduddとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1530年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで108歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jonet Llwyd ferch Jenkins Llwyd Hen(이)가 1422년 영국 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jenkyn Lloyd Ap Rhys(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Angharad Gruffudd(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 Lord Phillip Phillips ap Maredudd(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1530년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 108세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jonet Llwyd ferch Jenkins Llwyd Hen родилась в 1422 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Jenkyn Lloyd Ap Rhys было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Angharad Gruffudd, 42. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Lord Phillip Phillips ap Maredudd. Она умерла в 1530 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс в возрасте 108 лет.
